---
title: "von Mises-Fisher Mixture Models (vMF) for embedding clustering"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
embeddings <- as.matrix(read.csv("data/embeddings.csv", header = FALSE))
unique_values <- readLines("data/unique_values.txt")
rownames(embeddings) <- unique_values

X <- embeddings
```

# Clustering

```{r}
library(movMF)

# von Mises-Fisher mixture (proper cosine-based GMM)
vmf_model <- movMF(X, k = 10, nruns = 20)

# Cluster assignments
clusters <- predict(vmf_model, X)

# Soft probabilities
probs <- predict(vmf_model, X, type = "memberships")

# Model selection
bic_values <- sapply(2:10, function(k) {
  model <- movMF(X, k = k, nruns = 10)
  # Note: movMF doesn't have built-in BIC, use log-likelihood
  model$L  # log-likelihood
})
```

# Visuazliation

```{r}
library(movMF)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Assume you have:
# X: your original embedding matrix
# vmf_final: fitted movMF model

# Get results
vmf_final <- vmf_model
vmf_clusters <- predict(vmf_final, X)
vmf_probs <- predict(vmf_final, X, type = "memberships")

# ============================================
# 1. PCA PROJECTION (Most Common)
# ============================================

# Normalize data
X_normalized <- X / sqrt(rowSums(X^2))

# PCA
pca <- prcomp(X_normalized, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)
pca_data <- as.data.frame(pca$x[, 1:2])
pca_data$Cluster <- as.factor(vmf_clusters)
pca_data$Confidence <- apply(vmf_probs, 1, max)

# Basic cluster plot
p1 <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "vMF Clustering Results (PCA Projection)",
       subtitle = sprintf("%d clusters, %d samples", vmf_final$k, nrow(X))) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# Confidence-weighted plot
p2 <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Cluster)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = Confidence, alpha = Confidence)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1, 4)) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.3, 0.9)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "vMF Clustering with Confidence",
       subtitle = "Larger/darker points = higher confidence")

# Explained variance
var_explained <- summary(pca)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100
p1 <- p1 + labs(x = sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%% variance)", var_explained[1]),
                y = sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%% variance)", var_explained[2]))

print(p1)
print(p2)

# ============================================
# 2. t-SNE PROJECTION (Better for High-Dim)
# ============================================

library(Rtsne)

set.seed(42)
tsne_result <- Rtsne(X_normalized, dims = 2, perplexity = 30, 
                     max_iter = 1000, check_duplicates = FALSE)

tsne_data <- data.frame(
  tSNE1 = tsne_result$Y[, 1],
  tSNE2 = tsne_result$Y[, 2],
  Cluster = as.factor(vmf_clusters),
  Confidence = apply(vmf_probs, 1, max)
)

p3 <- ggplot(tsne_data, aes(x = tSNE1, y = tSNE2, color = Cluster)) +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = Confidence), size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "vMF Clustering (t-SNE Projection)")

print(p3)

# ============================================
# 3. CLUSTER SIZE DISTRIBUTION
# ============================================

cluster_sizes <- as.data.frame(table(vmf_clusters))
colnames(cluster_sizes) <- c("Cluster", "Count")

p4 <- ggplot(cluster_sizes, aes(x = Cluster, y = Count, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Cluster Size Distribution",
       y = "Number of Samples") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p4)

# ============================================
# 4. MEMBERSHIP PROBABILITY HEATMAP
# ============================================

# For a subset (first 100 samples or random sample)
n_samples_to_show <- min(100, nrow(X))
sample_idx <- sample(1:nrow(X), n_samples_to_show)

# Prepare data for heatmap
k <- nrow(vmf_final$theta)
heatmap_data <- vmf_probs[sample_idx, ]
rownames(heatmap_data) <- paste0("S", sample_idx)
colnames(heatmap_data) <- paste0("C", 1:k)

# Convert to long format for ggplot
heatmap_long <- heatmap_data %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(Sample = rownames(.)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Sample, names_to = "Cluster", values_to = "Probability") %>%
  mutate(Sample = factor(Sample, levels = unique(Sample)))

p5 <- ggplot(heatmap_long, aes(x = Cluster, y = Sample, fill = Probability)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "white", mid = "lightblue", high = "darkblue",
                       midpoint = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = sprintf("Membership Probabilities (n=%d samples)", n_samples_to_show)) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank())

print(p5)

# ============================================
# 5. CONFIDENCE DISTRIBUTION
# ============================================

confidence_data <- data.frame(
  Confidence = apply(vmf_probs, 1, max),
  Cluster = as.factor(vmf_clusters)
)

p6 <- ggplot(confidence_data, aes(x = Confidence, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, alpha = 0.7, position = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Assignment Confidence",
       x = "Maximum Membership Probability",
       y = "Count")

p7 <- ggplot(confidence_data, aes(x = Cluster, y = Confidence, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Confidence by Cluster",
       y = "Maximum Membership Probability") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

grid.arrange(p6, p7, ncol = 2)

# ============================================
# 6. UNCERTAINTY ANALYSIS
# ============================================

# Calculate entropy for each sample
entropy_per_sample <- apply(vmf_probs, 1, function(p) {
  -sum(p * log(p + 1e-10))
})

uncertainty_data <- data.frame(
  Sample = 1:nrow(X),
  Entropy = entropy_per_sample,
  Cluster = as.factor(vmf_clusters),
  MaxProb = apply(vmf_probs, 1, max)
)

p8 <- ggplot(uncertainty_data, aes(x = MaxProb, y = Entropy, color = Cluster)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Uncertainty Analysis",
       x = "Maximum Probability",
       y = "Entropy") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")

print(p8)

# Identify most uncertain samples
top_uncertain <- uncertainty_data %>%
  arrange(desc(Entropy)) %>%
  head(20)

cat("\nTop 20 most uncertain samples:\n")
print(top_uncertain[, c("Sample", "Entropy", "MaxProb", "Cluster")])

# ============================================
# 7. CLUSTER SEPARATION (SILHOUETTE)
# ============================================

library(cluster)

# Cosine distance
cos_dist <- as.dist(1 - X_normalized %*% t(X_normalized))
sil <- silhouette(vmf_clusters, cos_dist)

# Silhouette plot
sil_data <- data.frame(
  Sample = 1:nrow(X),
  Cluster = as.factor(vmf_clusters),
  SilhouetteWidth = sil[, 3]
)

p9 <- ggplot(sil_data, aes(x = reorder(Sample, SilhouetteWidth), 
                           y = SilhouetteWidth, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~ Cluster, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Silhouette Plot by Cluster",
       x = "Samples (ordered by silhouette width)",
       y = "Silhouette Width") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")

print(p9)

# Average silhouette by cluster
sil_summary <- sil_data %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    AvgSilhouette = mean(SilhouetteWidth),
    MinSilhouette = min(SilhouetteWidth),
    Count = n()
  )

cat("\nSilhouette Summary by Cluster:\n")
print(sil_summary)

# # ============================================
# # 8. MODEL PARAMETERS VISUALIZATION
# # ============================================
# 
# # Cluster centers (normalized directions)
# centers_data <- data.frame(
#   Cluster = 1:k,
#   Alpha = vmf_final$alpha,  # mixing proportions
#   Kappa = vmf_final$kappa   # concentration parameters
# )
# 
# p10 <- ggplot(centers_data, aes(x = as.factor(Cluster))) +
#   geom_bar(aes(y = Alpha, fill = "Mixing Proportion"), 
#            stat = "identity", alpha = 0.7) +
#   geom_point(aes(y = Kappa/max(Kappa) * max(Alpha), color = "Concentration (scaled)"), 
#              size = 4) +
#   scale_y_continuous(
#     name = "Mixing Proportion",
#     sec.axis = sec_axis(~./max(centers_data$Alpha)*max(centers_data$Kappa), 
#                         name = "Concentration Parameter (κ)")
#   ) +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   labs(title = "Cluster Parameters",
#        x = "Cluster") +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = "steelblue") +
#   scale_color_manual(values = "darkred") +
#   theme(legend.title = element_blank())
# 
# print(p10)

# # ============================================
# # 9. PAIRWISE CLUSTER SIMILARITY
# # ============================================
# 
# # Calculate cosine similarity between cluster centers
# cluster_similarity <- vmf_final$theta %*% t(vmf_final$theta)
# colnames(cluster_similarity) <- paste0("C", 1:vmf_final$k)
# rownames(cluster_similarity) <- paste0("C", 1:vmf_final$k)
# 
# # Convert to long format
# similarity_long <- as.data.frame(cluster_similarity) %>%
#   mutate(Cluster1 = rownames(.)) %>%
#   pivot_longer(cols = -Cluster1, names_to = "Cluster2", values_to = "Similarity")
# 
# p11 <- ggplot(similarity_long, aes(x = Cluster1, y = Cluster2, fill = Similarity)) +
#   geom_tile() +
#   geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", Similarity)), size = 3) +
#   scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red",
#                        midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   labs(title = "Cosine Similarity Between Cluster Centers") +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
# 
# print(p11)

# ============================================
# 10. COMBINED SUMMARY PLOT
# ============================================

# Create a comprehensive summary
summary_plot <- grid.arrange(
  p1,  # PCA with clusters
  p4,  # Cluster sizes
  p7,  # Confidence by cluster
  # p10, # Cluster parameters
  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
  top = "vMF Clustering Summary"
)

# ============================================
# 11. SAVE VISUALIZATIONS
# ============================================

# ggsave("vmf_pca_projection.png", p1, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
# ggsave("vmf_tsne_projection.png", p3, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
# ggsave("vmf_cluster_sizes.png", p4, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
# ggsave("vmf_silhouette.png", p9, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
# ggsave("vmf_cluster_similarity.png", p11, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
# 
# cat("\nVisualizations saved!\n")
```
